strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building agentic workflows and AI infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators
Strong backend and distributed systems background with real-time, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby and Optilyz using DLang, Node.js, and event-driven architectures
Proven track record of technical leadership and open-source contribution, including founding GISCollective and creating developer tooling like Fluent-Asserts and Trial
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active technical engagement and leadership continuity
Lack of explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or governing hybrid external engineering models as required
No clear demonstration of experience operating AI systems in regulated fintech environments or building compliance/audit infrastructure for financial decisioning
response.justification: The candidate brings strong technical depth in distributed systems, real-time infrastructure, and early-stage agentic AI tooling, with notable open-source contributions and full-stack versatility; however, the absence of documented fintech regulatory experience, team scaling leadership, and recent active employment significantly undermines alignment with the executive demands of this role.
